fixtures.title: Senior Backend Engineer
fixtures.notes: Backend role focused on APIs, reliability, and cloud operations.
fixtures.text: We are seeking a Senior Backend Engineer to build and scale API services. Requirements: 5+ years Python, experience with FastAPI or similar frameworks, strong SQL and PostgreSQL knowledge, AWS production experience, and a track record of building reliable systems with testing and observability.

fixtures.title: Frontend Engineer
fixtures.notes: Frontend role emphasizing React, TypeScript, and accessibility.
fixtures.text: We are hiring a Frontend Engineer to deliver user-facing features. Requirements: React and TypeScript expertise, experience with accessibility best practices, performance tuning, and close collaboration with design teams.

fixtures.title: Data Analyst
fixtures.notes: Analyst role with SQL, visualization, and experiment analysis.
fixtures.text: We are looking for a Data Analyst to support product and operations teams. Requirements: strong SQL skills, Tableau or Looker experience, solid statistics background, and ability to communicate insights clearly.

fixtures.title: Platform SRE
fixtures.notes: SRE role focused on reliability and infrastructure automation.
fixtures.text: We are hiring a Platform SRE to improve reliability and automation. Requirements: Kubernetes in production, Terraform infrastructure as code, CI/CD pipelines, on-call rotation experience, and strong monitoring/incident response practices.
